details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: MADE FOR COMFORT:High density egg crate foam orthopedic dog bed supports your fur baby's muscles and joints, relieves joint pain, a great choice for elderly or sick dog pets. they will love a day in the large dog bed.

COZY ROSE PATTERN PLUSH: The sleeping surface of the large size dog bed features luxurious rose pattern plush, soft and cozy plush provides a calming and anti-anxiety feel, allowing pets to fall into a deep sleep faster and gentle on the pet's nose and paw.

SOFA DOG BED DESIGN: The washable large dog bed is designed with U-shaped. 3 side 3.5 inch side pillow provide extra support for your pet's neck and head, allowing pets to rest better in the dog bed. The fence-like design makes the puppy feel more secure lying in it.

DIMENSIONS (DOG BEDS FOR MEDIUM DOGS): large Dog Bed 36" x 27" x 6.5" (3.5" bolstered side ) for medium and large dogs up to 60 lbs. For dogs that like to roll around, sizing up will be more comfortable.

WATERPROOF DOG BED & REMOVABLE DOG BED: The 3 side zippers on the dog bed cover make it easier to remove or put together for quick cleaning and easy care. The waterproof inner layer protects the egg foam from leaking urine and drool, allowing your puppy to use it with confidence at any time.

sustainability_features.summary: This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed well-made, comfortable, and easy to assemble and wash. The bed features a very soft cushion with plenty of padding, and they appreciate its durability, noting it holds up well even after washing. While some customers say it's perfect for medium to large dogs, others find it too small. Customers consider it a fantastic investment for pet owners.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect size, great quality, and my puppy loves it—I’ll definitely be buying the next size up soon!
authors_reviews.text: I got the BFPETHOME orthopedic dog bed for my new lab puppy, and she took to it right away. It’s the perfect size for her right now, with plenty of room to stretch out and get comfortable. You can tell it’s well-made and supportive, which gives me peace of mind as she’s growing.She clearly loves it, and that’s what matters most. I like the quality for the price, it feels like something that will hold up well.I’m sure she’ll outgrow this one in a few months (labs grow fast!), but when she does, I’ll definitely be coming back to order the next size up from this same brand. Highly recommend!
authors_reviews.author: Chad Eric Donley

authors_reviews.title: We love this excellent dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: I am super happy with this dog bed for medium size dogs. My dog is about 70 pounds, but I got the 36x27” 50 pound dog size because the larger one would not fit under the table where my dog normally sleeps on my yoga mat.I was worried because it seems like the main complaint on Amazon dog bed reviews is that the reasonably priced ones are thin and flimsy. The box it arrived in was so small, it didn’t make me feel any more confident, but I expected the foam to be compressed.Wow. When I opened the box, I was so pleased to see that setting the bed up would be simple. Other products' instructions I’d read said you need to put parts of the bed in the dryer to fluff them up! I took both pieces out of the box and spread them over a chair just to be sure they were aired out and expanded. However, there really was no smell and the egg crate style foam was already thick and very substantial. No worries!Another good thing is the zipper opens up on two rather than one side, so it’s really easy to insert the foam into the cover.I put a small carpet under the bed to keep it clean and prevent any slipping. This is not actually necessary. I also covered the entire bed with a fitted flannel sheet that I could tuck under the corners of the bed - which would not stay cute pink for long here in a Seattle winter. The sheet fits perfectly and looks like it is custom made for the bed.I specifically wanted the three-sided bolster because there is an air vent on the wall that cannot be obstructed. So the bolster is in the front. It’s a perfect pillow for my dog's chin. He loves it although he is not thrilled that the cat loves it too.
authors_reviews.author: Seattle Shopper

authors_reviews.title: Great cozy bed!
authors_reviews.text: This is the perfect bed, at the perfect price point! My girl is getting old (14) & she has quite a bit of anxiety. She can easily lay here & watch whatever I am doing. She’s loves this bed & it’s her favorite! It’s actually really soft & cozy! We love it & would recommend! 💕
authors_reviews.author: Amanda D

authors_reviews.title: Great Dog Bed
authors_reviews.text: Great size and does not slip and slide. The foam is real comfy, but a little hard to put in its sleeve. Also, its a basic 2-3 inch foam rectangle insert so if it goes flat the sleeve is always reusable! My puppy loves it and is pretty durable.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great bed. BUT BUYER BE AWARE.
authors_reviews.text: We bought this bed in size XL about a year ago for our dog. A great dog bed with no issues at all. The covering inside was great as well because if the dog had any accidents, you just open the inner lining which the foam was covered with a black material which would protect the foam from damage due to pet messes. Simply was lining and it's good. However, this time we bought the XL and received the Medium (was charged )for XL and along with that once we opened the cover the black material was missing and foam exposed which would ruin the bed if peed/poo on.UPDATE: ONE MORE PICTURE WAS MISSING SHOWING HOW THE BED ARRIVED. IT WAS NOT VACUUM SEALED. THIS IS NOT THE SELLERS FAULT BUT THE SHIPPING DEPARTMENT. THE SELLER REACHED OUT TO US AND ASKED FOR INFORMATION SO THEY COULD FIND OUT HOW AND WHY IT WAS SHIPPED WITHOUT BEING VACUUM SEALED. WE PURCHASED YET ANOTHER BED XL WHICH DID ARRIVE SEALED, BUT IN 3 DIFFERENT BAGS. 1 VACUUM SEALED THE OTHER ROLLED TIGHTLY WITH PLASTIC COVERING AND 3RD WAS JUST IN PLASTIC BAD NOT SEALED WHICH WAS THE COVERING OF DOG BED. WE WANTED TO USE THIS BED AS OUR OTHER DOG OF 7 1/2 YEARS DIED UNEXPECTED FROM A ROUTINE DENTAL APPOINTMENT. WE NOW HAVE TWO PUPPIES 6 MONTH OLD HUSKY AND 4 MONTH OLD LAB. THE DOG BED WE PURCHASED A YEAR AGO FOR OUR BELOVED PET WAS COMPLETELY SEALED THE WHOLE BED WAS VACUUM SEALED ROLLED TIGHTLY AND WE LOVED IT! OUR DOG HAD BOTH KNEES BLOWN BY AGE 1 DUE TO GENETICS WHICH ENDED UP WITH TPLO SURGURY TO BOTH KNEES SO WE WANTED THE VERY BEST FOR HER INCLUDING WHAT SHE WOULD NAP ON IN KENNEL FOR TRIPS. THIS DOG BED, SHE LOVED AND WE HAVE NOW GIVEN HERS TO OUR NEW LAB PUPPY. SHE LOVES IT AS WELL! WE ARE USING THE NEW WITH OUR HUSKY PUPPY AND WILL SEE HOW HE TAKES TO IT. OVERALL, THIS BED IS A GREAT BED WHICH IS WHY WE PURCHASED ANOTHER ONE. THE SELLER QUICKLY HANDLED AND SOUGHT TO LOOK INTO THE MATTER QUICKLY. IT'S MY OPINION TO CHECK ONCE THE BED ARRIVES AND CHECK IT TO MAKE SURE LINER IS IN THERE, ALSO CHECK TO MAKE SURE IT'S VACUUM SEALED UPON ARRIVAL. IF NOT, CONTACT SELLER RIGHT AWAY SO HE CAN FIX THIS ISSUE.WOULD I PURCHASE AGAIN?? YES I WOULD. IT'S A GREAT DOG BED. WASHABLE COVER WATERPROOF LINED ON INSIDE COMFORTABLE GOOD PRICED.We contacted the seller, and asked to refund/return in which they responded quickly. They not only refunded us but told us to keep the bed which was nice but we can not use it as is. They asked for pictures which are above attached so they can investigate why the black covering that should cover foam was missing which should've been.Buyer, please be aware of this. It's a great bed and our dog loves it. The one we purchased a year ago. However, make sure that you get the correct size your being charged for and also check the inner lining so you don't waste money on a bed if dog has accident which will ruin it.
authors_reviews.author: Chris

authors_reviews.title: Best doggy (and kitty) bed
authors_reviews.text: Have two of them because they’re so good. Easy to put together, the cushions are covered in easy to wipe material and of course the big perk is you can wash the cover. Best of all my dog loves them!
authors_reviews.author: Amalia Kelemen
